title: I discovered the Plague is a natural defense mechanism against the attacks of Bigfoot

enrichment.summary: While high, Kyle proposes an original stoner theory that the Black Death (bubonic plague) was a natural defense mechanism created from massive pools of blood on Mongol-era battlefields, ultimately designed to kill Bigfoot, who he imagines as a large hairy creature slaughtering humans. He traces the plague's historical spread from Mongol conquests through Crimea to Venice and Europe, weaving in actual historical details alongside the fantasy framing.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: The plague formed naturally from massive pools of blood on Mongol battlefields as a defense mechanism
Bigfoot is a real dirty hairy beast that was killing humans, and the plague evolved to kill it
Humans survived because they are smart enough to figure out how to fight it off
Rarely does videos but had to share this because it felt like an original eureka discovery
